name: profile: /init-guardrails offers to copy templates/tsconfig.strict.json into the project root when profile is strict or library
command: mkdir -p proj && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --profile strict --target "$PWD/proj" --apply-templates 2>out.txt && [ -f proj/tsconfig.strict.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
